notes: agy has /compact. Compaction's only transcript trace is a SYSTEM/CHECKPOINT '# Resuming from a compaction' line which the parser SKIPS — so compaction is not a distinct observable event (CompactionState is dead). The spec asserts only the visible state arc: ready→working→ready around /compact, then a normal turn after to prove the session continues. The compact_window may briefly enter working during summarization (only the post-compaction settle to ready is asserted). Single-birth adapter; tokens/cost absent (SQLite-only).

text: First user prompt populates context: ready → working
First turn completes back to ready (empty terminal PLANNER_RESPONSE)

After /compact runs, the session settles back to ready. The CHECKPOINT resume marker is skipped; state must not stick in waiting. State may briefly enter working during summarization — only the post-compaction settle to ready is asserted
Post-compaction user prompt drives ready → working — proves the session continues after /compact
Post-compaction turn completes back to ready
